summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nucleus Phase 1 MVP - personal productivity app with Dashboard, Habit Tracker, and Daily Planner. Fixed SelectItem component issue in Daily Planner.

ui_bugs.issue: SelectItem had empty string value causing React runtime error
ui_bugs.resolution: Changed empty string to 'none' value and updated handling logic

passed_tests: Landing page loads with Google login button
Dashboard page with greeting, daily intention, habit progress ring, stats
Habit Tracker page with 90-day grid, habit creation, streak counter
Daily Planner page with Eisenhower matrix, Pomodoro timer, brain dump

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor fix applied, all core features working)
